          Engineer Execution

          Larsen & Toubro Hyderabad, Telangana, India
          2 weeks ago

          See who Larsen & Toubro has hired for this role

          Join or sign in to find your next job

          Join to apply for the Engineer Execution role at Larsen & Toubro

          Forgot password?

          or

          New to LinkedIn? Join now

          By clicking Continue to join or sign in, you agree to LinkedIn’s User Agreement, Privacy Policy, and Cookie Policy.

          Save
          • Report this job
          • The Engineer – Execution – Site (Tower) – Civil Execution is responsible for the day-to-day execution of civil works for tower structures at the project site. The role involves ensuring timely, safe, and quality construction as per approved drawings and specifications, while coordinating with various stakeholders.
          • Execute tower-related civil works at the site as per approved drawings and construction schedules. Monitor daily progress and report deviations or bottlenecks to the site in charge.
          • Ensure adherence to quality and safety norms during all stages of tower construction. Coordinate with subcontractors, vendors, and other execution teams for a smooth workflow.
          • Conduct inspections and supervises concrete pouring, shuttering, reinforcement, and formwork. Ensure proper resource utilization, including manpower, materials, and machinery.
          • Ensure compliance with safety protocols and participate in toolbox talks and safety briefings. Monitor subcontractor performance and raise concerns as needed.
          • Assist in preparation of daily progress reports and quality documentation. Support in resolving technical issues at the site in coordination with engineering and design teams.

          • Seniority level

            Not Applicable

          • Employment type

            Full-time

          • Job function

            Engineering and Information Technology

          • Industries

            Executive Offices

          Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Larsen & Toubro by 2x
